antithesis_summary: Remove value embeddings entirely and let plain attention plus residual mixing do the work.
label: Value embeddings vs simplicity
thesis_summary: Keep alternating value embeddings because the current best run used them and they may improve information flow per token.
why_active: The incumbent spends roughly one third of its parameters on alternating value embeddings, but no completed local run has shown whether that mechanism actually buys better `val_bpb` inside a 300-second budget.
